pricing.title: Plans
pricing.subtitle: Pick what fits — switch anytime.
pricing.usageTeaser: Pay as you go · {{ price }} / unit — only pay for what you use

oneTime.title: One-time purchases
oneTime.subtitle: Pay once — no subscription needed, your plan stays unchanged.
oneTime.amountRange: Amount must be between {{ min }} and {{ max }}.

settings.title: Billing
settings.cancelMessage: Your plan stays active until the end of the current billing period, then reverts to Free.
settings.cancelSuccess: Subscription canceled — active until the period ends.
settings.creditsZeroHint: 0 credits — top up to cover metered usage.
settings.creditsNegativeHint: Balance overdrawn by a refund — usage is paused until you top up.

checkout.pendingMessage: We're still confirming your subscription. It will appear in your billing settings shortly.
checkout.canceledMessage: No charge was made. You can pick a plan whenever you're ready.
checkout.purchasePendingMessage: We're still confirming your payment. The receipt will appear in your invoices shortly.

changePlan.title: Change plan
changePlan.noTargets: No other plans are available for your billing provider.
changePlan.trialNote: You're on a trial — switching plans moves no money.
changePlan.providerSettles: The exact split is settled by the payment provider; this is the net amount.
changePlan.selectHint: Select a plan to see what you'd pay today.
changePlan.previewFailed: Could not calculate the proration. Pick the plan again to retry.
changePlan.success: Plan changed — the proration receipts are in your invoices.

errors.checkoutFailed: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
errors.cancelFailed: Could not cancel the subscription. Please try again.
errors.regionFailed: Could not change the billing region.
errors.changeFailed: Could not change the plan. Please try again.
errors.paymentMethodFailed: Could not start the payment-method update. Please try again.
errors.purchaseFailed: Could not start the purchase. Please try again.
errors.unsafeRedirect: Received an invalid checkout link. Please try again or contact support.
